user_story: As an Employee, I want to view my training programs with title, description, status and weekly schedule, so that I can see which programs I am enrolled in
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the My Training Programs screen; When the page loads; Then my training programs are listed with columns Title, Description, Status, Task and the weekday schedule (Su through Sa)

user_story: As an Employee, I want to filter my training programs by a schedule date range using From and To dates, so that I can find programs occurring within a specific period
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the My Training Programs screen; When I set a Schedule From and To date and click Search; Then only programs scheduled within that date range are shown

user_story: As an Employee, I want to filter my training programs by status such as Scheduled, Confirmed, Published or Completed, so that I can see programs in a particular state
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the My Training Programs screen; When I select a Status and click Search; Then only programs with that status are shown

user_story: As an Employee, I want to reset the search filters, so that I can clear my selections and view all my training programs again
acceptance_criteria: Given I have applied filters on the My Training Programs screen; When I click Reset; Then the filters clear and the full list of programs is displayed

user_story: As an Employee, I want to see the weekly day-of-week schedule for each training program, so that I know on which days sessions occur
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the My Training Programs screen; When I view a program row; Then the Su, Mo, Tu, We, Th, Fr and Sa columns indicate the scheduled days

user_story: As an Employee, I want to see and act on tasks associated with a training program, so that I can complete any pending confirmations or actions
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the My Training Programs screen; When a program has an associated task; Then the Task column shows the action I can take on that program
